entries.name: Ace Combat PS2 Trilogy HD HUD
entries.credits: Hand-made HUD textures by Ostrich with Roach Typografics, Zaku, PhantomPhanatic and Stahl; mirrored by EmuCoreX with the original source retained.
entries.description: High-resolution in-mission HUD, aircraft icons and weapon graphics for Ace Combat 04, Ace Combat 5 and Ace Combat Zero.

entries.name: GTA Liberty City Stories HQ HUD
entries.gameTitle: Grand Theft Auto: Liberty City Stories
entries.credits: HQ frontend pack by Mentraze with credited community texture contributors; repacked to ZIP and mirrored by EmuCoreX with the original source retained.
entries.description: Compact high-resolution frontend, map, font, weapon-icon and HUD texture pack for the North American PS2 release.

entries.name: GTA III AI Upscaled Texture Pack
entries.credits: AI-upscaled texture pack created by FunnyNameXYZ; mirrored by EmuCoreX with the original source retained.
entries.description: Large AI-upscaled replacement pack for the North American PS2 release of Grand Theft Auto III.

entries.name: GTA Vice City 4X AI Upscaled Texture Pack
entries.credits: 4X AI-upscaled texture pack created by FunnyNameXYZ; mirrored by EmuCoreX with the original source retained.
entries.description: Updated PNG-based 4X texture replacement pack for the North American PS2 release of Grand Theft Auto: Vice City.

entries.name: Need for Speed: Hot Pursuit 2 HD Remaster
entries.credits: HD remaster created by Siggy_Wiggy_Woo; EmuCoreX mirror removes the single community-confirmed broken leaf texture and retains the original source link.
entries.description: Mostly hand-remastered vehicles, tracks, interface and environment textures for the North American and European releases.

entries.name: Need for Speed: Most Wanted Black Edition HD Textures
entries.gameTitle: Need for Speed: Most Wanted Black Edition
entries.credits: HD texture pack created by SomberShroud using 4xHDCube 4; mirrored by EmuCoreX with the original source retained.
entries.description: Extensive upscaled building, vehicle, road, frontend and world texture pack for the North American Black Edition.

entries.name: Gran Turismo 4 HD HUD & UI (US/PAL)
entries.credits: HD HUD and UI created by Silentwarior112; EmuCoreX Western edition retains the complete US, PAL and Online Beta content while omitting Japanese- and Korean-only resources to fit verified distribution limits.
entries.description: Remastered menus, text, dealership images, logos, maps and in-race HUD with corrected 16:9 presentation for western GT4 releases.

entries.name: Gran Turismo 3 Retexture Mobile DDS Edition
entries.credits: GT3 Retexture Mod created by GtafanWRLD; EmuCoreX Mobile DDS edition preserves all 13,714 original DDS replacements while omitting the PNG subset so the pack stays within Android import and GitHub distribution limits.
entries.description: Android-practical edition covering the original pack's high-resolution track, rally and S-class car DDS textures across the main US, PAL and Japanese releases.

entries.name: Gran Turismo 4 HD HUD & UI (Japan/Korea)
entries.credits: HD HUD and UI created by Silentwarior112; EmuCoreX Japan/Korea edition retains Japanese, Korean and shared content while omitting western-only resources to fit verified distribution limits.
entries.description: Remastered menus, regional text, dealership images, logos, maps and in-race HUD for the Japanese and Korean GT4 releases.

entries.name: MGS2 HD UI
entries.credits: Created and maintained by NathanHigley.
entries.description: High-resolution user-interface texture replacement pack.

entries.name: GTA Vice City Stories PC Texture Pack
entries.gameTitle: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City Stories
entries.credits: Pack published by ASI Factory; textures adapted from the PC version.
entries.description: PC-derived texture replacement pack for the North American PS2 release.

entries.name: Crash Mind Over Mutant Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created by CRASHARKI; Xbox 360 texture assistance by Null.
entries.description: Characters, environments, frontend, fonts and controller prompts rebuilt from Xbox 360 assets and upscales.

entries.name: Crash Nitro Kart Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created and maintained by CRASHARKI.
entries.description: Regional fonts, menus, character and track artwork, maps, prompts and other interface textures.

entries.name: Crash of the Titans Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created and maintained by CRASHARKI.
entries.description: Xbox 360-derived characters, world and frontend textures plus upscaled fonts and controller prompts.

entries.name: Crash Tag Team Racing Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created and maintained by CRASHARKI.
entries.description: Extensive frontend, characters, tracks, maps, icons, fonts, prompts and multilingual on-screen text.

entries.name: Crash Twinsanity Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created and maintained by CRASHARKI.
entries.description: Upscaled characters, world textures, galleries, regional fonts, level cards, icons and screens.

entries.name: Spyro: A Hero's Tail Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created and maintained by CRASHARKI.
entries.description: Characters, environments, HUD, maps, fonts, prompts, gallery art and 4:3/widescreen variants.

entries.name: Speed Racer HD Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created and published by BMT619.
entries.description: High-resolution replacement pack for the North American PS2 release.

entries.name: The Warriors Xbox Texture Pack
entries.credits: Created and published by eternights using Xbox-version texture assets.
entries.description: Large Xbox-derived texture replacement pack for the North American PS2 release.

entries.name: Battle Gear 3 English Texture Pack
entries.credits: English texture translation created and published by ludusregard.
entries.description: English-language interface and text replacements for the Japanese PS2 release.
